name: Rithm Capital Corp. 7.125% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Rithm Capital Corp. 7.125% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred equity offered by Rithm Capital Corp. Similar to the Series A preferred stock, these shares offer a fixed dividend rate that may convert to a floating rate, and holders have preferential rights over common stockholders. Details of the offering, including redemption terms and other provisions, are found in the company's disclosures.
